message:
fix(termios): remove redundant outer parentheses in cfset{i,o}speed bitmask expressions

Clippy's unnecessary_operation/redundant_closure_call was flagging the
outer parens around `(*termios_p).c_cflag & !termios_core::CBAUD` since
the bitwise NOT and AND operators already have the correct precedence
relative to the subsequent OR. The outer parens were harmless but
inconsistent with the style used elsewhere in the crate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
